notes: Slat armor (stand-off bar armor) uses spaced steel bars to disrupt HEAT warheads by damaging the shaped charge liner or breaking the piezoelectric fuze circuit before the jet forms. Thin bars offer ~20% the resistance of solid RHA of same total mass; primary mechanism is HEAT disruption rather than direct KE resistance. Common on Stryker, M113, and MRAP vehicles as add-on RPG protection.
